steps.title: Spot abundance signals
steps.content: The passage describes an outpouring of poetry, fiction, essays, and more, then calls this writing a flood. Those words show that the period produced a large amount of literature.

steps.title: Match the volume word
steps.content: A suggests only occasional production, B suggests unevenness, and C suggests lack of favor. The context instead emphasizes plentiful literary output that can draw attention away from earlier writers. The answer is D.
